footer.text: Character Guide • Build: Zibai | Update Date: 02/27/2026 | Editor: ._.samantha._.

fields.name: Best Weapon(s):
fields.value:
__Lightbearing Moonshard__
Signature and BiS. It is difficult to compare to alternatives.

__Harbinger of Dawn__
A 3-star weapon, if the passive is active, is her BiS free option.

fields.name: Replacement Weapon(s):
fields.value:
__Uraku Misugiri, Light of Foliar Incision__
5-star alternatives that do perform better than the Harbinger of Dawn, but aren't worth pulling exclusively for Zibai.

__Flute of Ezpitzal, Cinnabar Spindle__
Free 4-star alternatives that are better than the Harbinger of Dawn ONLY if it's the passive is down. 

__Primordial Jade Cutter,  Splendor of Tranquil Waters, Haran Geppaku Futsu, and all other 5-star statsticks__
Not worth pulling for, just use Harbinger of Dawn, unless you are really cannot keep her above 80% HP.

fields.name: Main Stats Priority
fields.value: <sands> DEF%|<goblet> DEF%|<circlet> CRIT DMG or CRIT Rate

fields.name: Talent Priority
fields.value:
**1)** Elemental Skill: Heaven and Earth Made Manifest
**2)** Elemental Burst: Tri-Sphere Eminence
**N/A)** Normal Attack: Golden Blade's Petaled Touch

fields.name: Notes:
fields.value: If playing with Furina, it may be difficult to maintain the 80% HP threshold without a good healer, making __Harbinger of Dawn__ significantly worse.
